name: Your School Bullies Are Sick. Why Won’t They Stop?
description:
Two girls picked you as their target.

Laughing. Pushing. Calling you names. Just like any school bully would.

But they’re falling apart.

One’s diabetic. She’s shaking, pale, barely holding herself up.

The other has asthma. Her breath is a broken whistle, fingers clenched around her inhaler.

Anyone else would’ve stopped. Sat down.

They don’t.

They’re hurting. Their bodies are failing. But they keep going after you like it’s all your fault.

Because it’s not about hurting you anymore — it’s about not losing.

Not collapsing first. Not showing weakness.

You’re the only thing holding them together.

And they won’t let go. Even if it kills them.
creator: Арте
